//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// This is a WinOLS "ProjectProperties->ReadingHardware" file.
// Do not edit while it's inside "c:\program files". Copy it to your own folder first!
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// You can use it to define the values for the ReadingHardware combobox drop-down.
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Format:
//   My ReadingHardware 1
//   My ReadingHardware 2
//
//   // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//   My ReadingHardware 3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
//   -My Subpoint 1
//   -My Subpoint 2
//--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Start editing here:
My ReadingHardware 1
My ReadingHardware 2

// My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
My ReadingHardware 3 // My optional comment (not shown in the drop-down)
-My Subpoint 1
-My Subpoint 2
